question_text: Methods of Contact
What type of ticket or task was the contact attempt related to?
Task Contact
Did the agent attempt to leave a voicemail/message with the ticket/task contact?
Was the proper script followed when leaving a voicemail/message for the ticket/task contact?
Main Contact
Does policy require attempting to contact the main contact (name/phone number is different than the task contact)?
Did the agent attempt to leave a voicemail/message with the main account contact?
Did the agent attempt to leave a voicemail/message with the main account contact?
Site Contacts
Does policy require attempting to contact the site contact(s) (name/phone number is different then the main or task contact)?
Did the agent attempt to leave a voicemail/message with EVERY site contact associated with the sites on the invoice?
Was the proper script followed when leaving a voicemail/message for the site contact?
Google Research
Does policy require trying to find an alternate phone number by googling the site name(s) and line 1 of the site address(es)?
Were any additional numbers found that could be called?
Did the agent attempt to leave a voicemail/message with one of the Google contacts?
Was the proper script followed when leaving a voicemail/message for the Google contact?
Exit Survey
Did the agent follow the Exit Survey call cadence?
Did the agent leave a voicemail/message for the Exit Survey task contact?
Was the proper script followed when leaving a voicemail/message for the Exit Survey task contact?
Hold to Activate
Did the agent follow policy on Hold to Activate call cadence?
Did the agent leave a voicemail/message for the Hold to Activate task contact?
Was the proper script followed when leaving a voicemail/message for the Hold to Activate task contact?
Tickets
Did the agent follow policy on ticket call cadence?
Did the agent leave a voicemail/message for the ticket contact?
Was the proper script followed when leaving a voicemail/message for the ticket contact?
Methods of Contact Pass/Fail
Overall, did the agent miss any Methods of Contact steps?
Methods of Contact Feedback
Agent Communication - Other Than Appropriate Contact
Did the agent communicate with someone to reach the appropriate billing contact?
Did the agent follow the script when communicating with someone to reach the appropriate billing contact?
Contact Addition
Was a contact addition needed?
Did the agent add the new contact(s) to the CRM?
Contact Removal
Was contact removal needed?
Were the appropriate contact(s) set as inactive?
Contact Assignment
Was contact assignment needed?
Were the contact(s) assigned properly?
Contact Management Feedback
Automated Attendant
Did the agent encounter an auto-attendant?
Was policy regarding auto attendant navigation followed?
Was policy regarding menu option repeats followed?
Did the agent attempt to leave a voicemail/message when using the auto-attendant?
Was the proper script followed when leaving a voicemail/message when using the auto-attendant?
CSR Professionalism
At any point during the contact attempt did the agent talk to a person or leave a voicemail/message?
Did the agent refrain from use of jargon?
Did the agent refrain from the use of slang?
Was the agent articulate, patient, and polite?
Was appropriate pace, grammar, and diction used?
Professionalism / Rapport Feedback
General Documentation
Was the support interaction documented?
Was the interaction documented in the proper CRM area (Task / Ticket)?
Task Specific Documentation
Was the support interaction documented in a task?
Was the task assigned to the correct user?
Was the task notes field completed properly?
Was the task status set properly?
Was the task next contact date set properly?
Ticket Specific Documentation
Was the support interaction documented in a ticket?
Was the site selected accurately?
Was the contact set accurately?
Was the description completed properly?
Was the classification / subclassification set accurately?
Was the ticket assigned to the correct user?
Was the ticket notes field completed properly?
Was the ticket status set properly?
Was the ticket next contact date set properly?
Tech Support Specific Documentation
Was this a tech support interaction?
Was the radio type accurately selected in the ticket?
Was an accurate device ID / username entered?
Did the description field include the error indicator status?
Did the troubleshooting approach match the process in the Knowledge Base?
Invoice Specific Documentation
Was the support interaction documented in an invoice support ticket?
Was an accurate order number entered?
Installation Specific Documentation
Was the support interaction documented in an installation support ticket?
Was the correct job selected?
Ticket / Task Documentation Feedback
Work From Home Policy
Did the CSR follow all work from home policies?

On Hold Procedure
Did the CSR put the customer on hold?
Was permission to put the customer on hold asked?
Was an expected wait time for the hold provided?
Was the customer thanked for waiting when returning to the call?
Call Transfer Procedure
Did a call transfer take place during the call?
Was the need for transfer acknowledged with an apology for the inconvenience?
Was the reason for the transfer explained?
Was the customer assured they'd be transferred to the right person/department?
as the contact information for transfer destination provided?
Was the customer's consent to transfer confirmed?
Was the customer thanked for their patience?

Were actions taken on behalf of customer restated?

Was the customer asked if they needed any additional assistance?
Was the customer thanked for choosing Dynamic Media?
Did the agent wait for the customer to hang up first?
